kab:Ini-as i Tom ur ilaq ara ad ixdem ayenni
kab:Ur ilaq ara ad iẓer walbaɛḍ dakken nezweǧ
kab:Ur yezmir ara ad yamen Tom ayen akken i yeḍṛan tura
kab:Ḥedd ur yeẓṛi dakken qrib ad d-yas Tom
kab:Tom yeẓra ur ssineɣ ad cnuɣ akken ilaq
kab:Tom yella ur yebɣi ara ad yeffeɣ seg uxxam-nni
kab:Ruḥeɣ ɣer din iwakken ad as-mmeslayeɣ
kab:Acḥal i tebɣiḍ ad tedduḍ ɣer wanda akken i tebɣiḍ ad truḥeḍ
kab:Ur ttizmireɣ ara ad xedmeɣ ayagi mebla kemm
kab:Ula yiwen seg yimawlan-iw ur yezmir ad ihder Tafransist
kab:Tella tesɛa akud akken ad texdem ayen tḥemmel
kab:Ula d nekk bɣiɣ ad mmeslayeɣ akked Tom
kab:Ur iḥemmel ara Tom ad yemmeslay ɣef waya
kab:Ur iɣil ara Tom d akken zemreɣ ad xedmeɣ aya
kab:Nezmer ad nɛawed ad neg deg-s laman mi ara yerreẓ ﹖
kab:Ssarameɣ ad k-ẓreɣ imalas i d-iteddun

kab:Ur ttizmireɣ ara ad xedmeɣ ayagi mebla netta

kab:Tili ur ilaq ara ad yeqqim da i yiman-is
kab:Tom iḥemmel ad yurar tennis, ma d Mary ala
kab:Ulac ccek dakken ad as-tɛemmed ad yexdem aya
kab:Yessefk ɣef Tom ad yexdem ayagi anda nniḍen
kab:Ayɣeṛ ur tetteddum ara ad turarem akked Tom﹖
kab:D ayyuren aya seg wasmi ay la tessefray mary ad tessikel
kab:Mary testaɛmel ur tezmir ara ad temmeslay tafṛansist
kab:Seg wakken meqqer armi ay yezmer ad yili d jeddi-s
kab:Tom ur yeẓri ara acu i ilaqen ad t-yexdem
kab:Sami ur yuklal ara ad t-is-ssuffɣen seg uxeddim
kab:Llant kra n tɣawsiwin ur zmiren ara ad tent-id-sɣen yidrimen
kab:Tom iḥemmel ad yurar tennis, mačči am Mary
kab:Sarameɣ ad d-qqleɣ letnayen i d-iteddun
kab:Ur iyi-ttaǧǧa ara ad d-skecmeɣ iman-iw, ma ulac aɣilif
kab:Dadda yetteddu ad yegmer iselman yal tagara n dduṛt
kab:Yella d acu i zemreɣ ad t-xedmeɣ i wakken ad tent-ɛiwneɣ﹖
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad t-xedmeɣ mebla ma tɛawen-iyi kra n yiwet
kab:Ur yelli ara yessefk ad teddu ɣer uxxam ɣef uḍar
kab:Daya kan i zemreɣ ad xedmeɣ akka tura
kab:Llan yiɣersiwen izemren ad ɣiwlen deg tazzla ɣef yemdanen
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nexdem ayagi mebla aɛiwen-inek
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nexdem ayagi mebla tallelt-nwent
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nexdem ayagi mebla aɛiwen-nwen
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken tella da akken ad teqqim
kab:Ttif ad txedmeḍ tura, wala ad tendemmeḍ ɣer sdat
kab:Ur tezmireḍ ara ad as-tiniḍ i Tom d acu ara yexdem
kab:Ttruḥeɣ ad urareɣ tinis mi d-ffɣeɣ seg uɣerbaz
kab:Ur tezmirem ara ad temmeslayem taglizit s 100 n wawalen
kab:Yenna-d Tom dakken yesɛa kra ad k-t-id yefk

kab:Ulac amek ur yewwit akken ad d-yawi arraz-a
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nexdem ayagi mebla tallelt-nwen
